name: Stockton Unified School District
districtFact: Stockton Unified is a public school district in Stockton, San Joaquin County, California. The district publishes 180-day instructional calendar PDFs with first day, last day, trimester dates, quarter dates, break windows, holidays, and teacher non-contact days.

about.title: About Stockton Unified
about.content: Stockton Unified School District, also known as SUSD, is a public school district serving TK-12 families in Stockton, San Joaquin County, California. Its instructional calendars list the first and last day of school, Fall Break, Thanksgiving Break, Winter Break, Spring Break, holidays, grading periods, and teacher professional development or non-contact days.

about.title: How to Use This Stockton USD Calendar
about.content: Use this page to plan around the districtwide instructional calendar. Families should confirm campus events, minimum days, conferences, athletics, testing, and graduation details through Stockton Unified and their school.

planningTips.title: Planning Tips for Stockton Families
content: Track teacher professional development and other non-contact days separately because they may not align with major breaks.
Use the listed trimester and quarter end dates for report-card and progress planning.
Confirm site-specific events with your school because the district PDF covers the instructional calendar, not every campus activity.
Check the official Stockton Unified calendar page for revised PDF files before booking travel.

customSections.label: Parent Planning Guide for Stockton Unified 2026-2027
customSections.content: Families can use the Stockton Unified 2026-2027 calendar to plan school preparation, childcare, family travel, and academic checkpoints around the districtwide instructional schedule.

groups.label: Family planning highlights
items: Back-to-school preparation should be completed before the July 30, 2026 first student day, including enrollment updates, transportation planning, and school supplies.
Fall Break and Thanksgiving Break create two separate fall planning windows for childcare, travel, and student activities.
Winter Break is the longest scheduled student break in the 2026-2027 Stockton Unified calendar, running from December 21, 2026 through January 1, 2027.
Spring Break runs March 15-19, 2027 and is the main extended student break before the final grading period.
Summer break begins after the May 26, 2027 last student day, followed by teacher professional development or non-contact dates listed on the official calendar.

customSections.label: Stockton Unified School Calendar Area Context
customSections.content: Families searching for Stockton school calendars often compare schedules across San Joaquin County and nearby Central Valley districts. This page focuses on the districtwide Stockton Unified instructional calendar; campus events, athletics, testing, conferences, and graduation details may be published separately by individual schools.

compareIntro: Compare the Stockton Unified school calendar with other California district calendars currently available on MySchoolDates. Dates shown include the first day, last day, and major breaks.

districtFaqs.q: Which Stockton Unified calendar does this page summarize?
districtFaqs.a: This page summarizes the Stockton Unified 180-day instructional calendar PDFs for the listed school years.

districtFaqs.q: Where should families verify Stockton Unified calendar updates?
districtFaqs.a: Use the official Stockton Unified calendar page and campus announcements for final confirmation. MySchoolDates is an independent reference and is not affiliated with Stockton Unified.

districtFaqs.q: Are Stockton Unified calendars the same for all schools?
districtFaqs.a: Most districtwide instructional dates apply across Stockton Unified schools, but individual campuses may publish separate events, minimum days, conferences, testing schedules, athletics, and graduation details.
